prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration in the style of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, presented as a dramatic vintage manga character sheet poster for OpenAI personified as a glamorous female stand master. The layout is a single page with 6 distinct sections framed by ornate art nouveau borders and manga panel lines. Main section on the left: a full-body fashion portrait of the character in a confident contrapposto pose, wearing a tailored white suit with emerald green and black accents, gold trim, a long cape lined in teal, fitted vest, corset-like torso panel, high-waisted pants, heeled shoes, gloves, chain accessories, circular hair ornaments, earrings, and multiple OpenAI logo emblems integrated into the outfit. The belt buckle reads GPT, the pant leg has vertical text reading “SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT,” and the jacket sleeve shows the OpenAI name and logo. Her hair is silver-white, styled in elaborate curled twin buns and long ringlets, with glossy emerald accessories and JoJo-inspired luxury fashion detailing. Top left section: a cream parchment title panel with the OpenAI logo and the large text “OpenAI”, plus 3 text blocks reading “STAND NAME: GPT-∞”, “[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”, and “STAND MASTER: OPENAI”, followed by an italic Spanish quote: “La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto.” Top right section: a close-up portrait panel of the same woman from the shoulders up, turned partly away with one hand raised elegantly, against a dark purple manga background with 4 large stylized purple sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with smaller English translation beneath it: “Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” and “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)” Center-right section: a stand ability information box titled “STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]” with Spanish descriptive text beneath: “Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente.” Lower center-right section: a humanoid robotic stand in a dynamic reaching pose, feminine and sleek, with a glossy black faceplate displaying the OpenAI knot logo, white biomechanical armor, emerald glowing seams, gold accents, and several floating holographic rings and data panels orbiting around it. The rings contain readable words including “DATA”, “CREATIVITY”, “REASONING”, and a distorted futuristic label similar to “RETRIEVAL/AGENT”. The background is cosmic and starry with dramatic energy effects. Bottom right section: a smaller rear three-quarter portrait panel of the woman looking over her shoulder with a confident smile and one finger near her chin, again over a purple manga background with 3 large stylized sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with two lines: “¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” and “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN.” Bottom left section: a circular JoJo-style stat chart with 6 labeled attributes in Spanish, showing “POTENCIAL ∞”, “VELOCIDAD A”, “ALCANCE ∞”, “DURABILIDAD B”, “PRECISIÓN A”, and “POTENCIA A”. Under it, include a small cream biography box titled “OPENAI” with Spanish text: “Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” and “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad.” Use a richly inked manga print aesthetic, detailed crosshatching, cel shading, aged paper texture, elegant cream margins, deep emerald, ivory, black, and gold palette, exaggerated JoJo fashion anatomy, sharp linework, dramatic comic-book composition, and luxurious supernatural sci-fi energy.
